description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by a dense arrangement of trees, featuring a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The structure is primarily composed of white and gray materials, with green accents visible on the roof and facade. A wide driveway leads up to a covered carport or garage area, and the main entrance is set back from the street, providing privacy. The landscaping is minimalistic, with the trees forming a natural barrier around the property. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the building, allowing for ample natural light. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with a focus on horizontal lines and open outdoor space.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with white and gray exterior, green accents, and surrounded by numerous trees. Features a wide driveway, carport, and large asymmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, main entrance, and dense tree coverage around the bungalow.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the building, green roof accents, and the arrangement of trees along the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard area, more green roof sections, and the continuation of tree coverage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the flat roof, geometric structure, and the spread of trees encircling the bungalow.
